sections.paragraph:
δευτερόω fut. δευτερώσω LXX; 1 aor. ἐδευτέρωσα (LXX) (PsSol 5:131) do someth. a second time ὁ δὲ Παῦλος ἐδευτέρου καὶ εἶπεν αὐτῷ Paul spoke to it (the lion) a second time AcPl Ha 5, 3.—DELG s.v. δεύτερος.

fut. fut. = fut.

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

aor. aor. = aorist

PsSol PsSol = Psalms of Solomon—List 2

someth. someth. = something

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 221
